lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: You know it's sometimes funny how things work out, I lose some gold but find an item, or I lose an item and find some gold... no-one ever knows what's gone where ya know.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Sorry, mate. Train up your Thieving skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Sorry, mate. Train up your Agility skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about your cape?

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Certainly! Skillcapes are a symbol of achievement. Only people who have mastered a skill and reached level 99 can get their hands on them and gain the benefits they carry.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: The Cape of Thieving provides a nice boost to your chances of pickpocketing when worn. Is there anything else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Sorry, mate. Train up your Thieving skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Sorry, mate. Train up your Agility skill to at least 50 and I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: How can that be? Go check again!

lines.speaker: Martin Thwait
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
